theme_rankings.why_now: 거버넌스보단 실제 트래픽·결제 사용처. TON·BNB 일일 활성 유저 검증.
theme_rankings.risk: 투기 대비 변동성 낮지만 폭발력도 작음. 환희장에서 underperform.

theme_rankings.why_now: 토큰 가격은 하락했지만 매출 폭증 중. AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출 직접.
theme_rankings.risk: 토큰 인플레이션 압력 + 사용자 보상 의존. 베어 마켓에서 매도 압력 큼.

theme_rankings.why_now: 기관 자금 유입 가장 빠른 영역. BlackRock·Franklin 등 진입.
theme_rankings.risk: 규제 의존적. 거시 금리 환경 변화 시 단기 자금 이탈 가능.

theme_rankings.why_now: 실제 매출 + 토큰 보유자 환원. P/S 가시화로 밸류에이션 재평가 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 스마트컨트랙트 위험 + 규제. 매출은 시장 변동성에 큰 폭으로 변동.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🥇 시장 방향성 기준 — 비트는 디지털 금, 이더는 인프라
theme_rankings.why_now: BTC ETF 자금 유입, ETH 스테이킹 + L2 매출. 알트 사이클의 출발점.
theme_rankings.risk: 거시 유동성·금리에 직접 노출. ETF 자금 흐름이 단기 방향성을 좌우.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🌐 검증된 L1 — 이더 외 실수요 입증된 체인들
theme_rankings.why_now: 솔라나 압도적 점유 + 신흥 L1(Sui·Aptos)도 자금 유입. 생태계 prop value 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: L1 간 경쟁 격화. 사용자·개발자 이탈 시 멀티플 빠르게 축소.

theme_rankings.tagline: 📈 ETF 승인 후보 + 이더 L2 — 기관 매집 영역
theme_rankings.why_now: SOL·LTC ETF 가능성 + L2 거래량 회복. 다음 cycle 메이저 후보.
theme_rankings.risk: ETF 미승인 시 단기 조정. L2는 fee market 경쟁 심화.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🤖 크립토 버전 AI 베팅 — 분산 컴퓨팅·에이전트
theme_rankings.why_now: AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출. 미국 AI 주식 테마와 동행 흐름.
theme_rankings.risk: 내러티브 의존도 큼. 실수요 검증 아직 미흡. 알트 변동성 폭.

narrative.summary: Hyperliquid: 정량 종합 54점, 라벨 HOLD. 단기 65 / 중기 60 / 장기 42. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)

top_news.title: Japan Official Sows Doubt Over Potential US Treasuries Sales
top_news.summary: A senior Japanese Finance Ministry official sowed doubt over any prospects for the nation to sell US Treasuries as part of any move to prop up the yen, suggesting the maneuver could end up being counterproductive.

top_news.title: AMP Trims ‘Frothy’ Private Credit Assets in Investment Pivot
top_news.summary: Australian pension and wealth manager AMP Ltd. has been scaling back its exposure to private credit, citing an increasingly frothy market as its shifts money toward assets such as infrastructure.

top_news.title: Gold Inches Up as Traders Weigh Iran Deal Prospects, Inflation
top_news.summary: Gold rose slightly as investors assessed mixed signals about the possibility of a US-Iran ceasefire deal, while also weighing the odds that elevated energy prices will prompt central banks to keep interest rates higher for longer.

top_news.title: Fast-Moving Sandy Fire Out of Control Near Los Angeles
top_news.summary: A brush fire in Southern California's Simi Valley has prompted evacuations as high winds fuel the blaze. The Sandy Fire broke out Monday morning about 20 miles northwest of Los Angeles. It has consumed about 184 acres and remains out of control according to state fire officials. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: AI Chip Startup Tenstorrent Draws Takeover Interest From Intel, Qualcomm
top_news.summary: Artificial intelligence chip startup Tenstorrent Inc. is drawing early takeover interest from prospective buyers at a moment of renewed momentum for upstarts looking to challenge Nvidia Corp. and Advanced Micro Devices Inc.

top_news.title: Foreign Holdings of Treasuries Fell in March Amid Bill Sales
top_news.summary: Foreign holdings of US Treasuries dropped in March from a record high as overseas investors dumped bills while adding to their stockpile of longer-dated federal securities.

top_news.title: Stocks End Choppy Day Little Changed as Yields Steady; SOX Drops
top_news.summary: The S&P 500 Index ended a choppy session on Monday near where it started trading, with swings in oil prices setting the tempo during the day as investors parsed mixed signals around US-Iran peace talks. Ten-year Treasury yields steadied below 4.6%, while semiconductor stocks traded lower.

top_news.title: NextEra to Buy Dominion for $67 Billion to Form Power Giant
top_news.summary: NextEra Energy Inc. agreed to pay about $67 billion in stock for Dominion Energy Inc. in the biggest power acquisition ever, creating a giant utility extending from Florida to the artificial intelligence data centers clustered in Virginia.

top_news.title: Texas Fund Revealed as Big Backer of State Street Credit ETF
top_news.summary: The identity of an investor that dramatically boosted assets in State Street Corp.’s private credit ETF has been revealed as a $60 billion sovereign wealth fund that provides funding to Texas public schools.

top_news.title: SpaceX IPO Adds Second Musk Stock. It’s a Problem for Tesla
top_news.summary: For years, there was only one way for mom-and-pop investors to buy into Elon Musk’s vision: shares of Tesla Inc. That’s about to change — and it’s a serious risk for Tesla investors.
